source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/11_Clinical Evaluation/Clinical Image Report/007_Clinical Image Report - G1417CWP.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical consideration report comparing plain radiographic images from objective device G1417CWP with comparative equipment A1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Technical documentation evidence for clinical evaluation of diagnostic image quality and image acquisition performance.
keyPoints: Objective Device: G1417CWP by H&abyz; Comparative Equipment: A1417MCW made by H&Abyz.
Output data uses communications standard DICOM 3.0 for downloading and analysis.
Thirty radiographic views were evaluated using S, A, B, C grading where S is Perfect=4.
Total Average was 3.98 for A1417MCW and 3.95 for G1417CWP.
The conclusion states G1417CWP has slight image differences but is not too difficult to diagnose and seems to be more of a diagnostic value.
Clinical evaluation was conducted by a qualified medical specialist in radiology.

reviewFlags.reason: No authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal CE/MDR appears only in metadata.
Knee AP section references F1417MCW while the document header, title, and most sections identify G1417CWP.
Document date is extracted from Rev. Date May/10/2025; signature dates of May/16/2025 are also present.
Some OCR/text quality issues are present, including DCIOM 3.0, Insperction, SS, and fragmented table rows.
